title: Mr. Barry’s Rose Artificial Flowers in Grave Flower Pots – UV-Resistant, Long-Lasting Design for Cemetery, Grave Displays, Home & Garden Memorial Arrangements (Yellow Orange & Red)
features: 💐GRAVE FLOWERS 💐 This beautiful grave flower arrangement is the perfect way to remember a loved one. These flowers for graves are suitable for use all year round. Crafted with a sturdy plastic grave pot with attached flowers. This grave flower pot is designed to hold artificial flowers securely in place for a long-lasting decoration. Ideal for cemetery and graveside display.

🌻FLOWERS FOR GRAVES🌻 A wide range of occasions, from birthdays, anniversaries and funerals, artificial flowers are a great way to add colour and life to any space. funeral flowers can be used in a variety of ways, from being used as centrepiece displays for dinner tables, to being planted in garden beds, or to being used as decoration for graves.

🪴CEMETERY FLOWER POTS🪴 The size of the grave flower pots is 25 cm high with a 14cm diameter and the weight is 160 grams making it very convenient to move and store. To clean, Simply rinse with water or wipe with a cloth or cleansing wipe. This Grave Flowers Pot is the perfect gift to remember a loved one. This Grave Flower Pot is supplied unweighted and you may need to add some weight to the pot if placed in windy locations

🌼GRAVE POTS WITH ARTIFICIAL FLOWERS🌼 These artificial Grave flower arrangements are made with the high quality materials, giving them a durable and long-lasting finish that Is suitable for outdoor use in all weather conditions. With a various colours to choose from they will make a lovely display of funeral on any garden or place
description: Product Description Everlasting Elegance: Premium Artificial Rose Arrangements for Thoughtful Memorials Vibrant and Lifelike Roses Our artificial rose arrangements are meticulously crafted to mimic the beauty of real roses. The rich hues of yellow, orange, and red add a touch of elegance to any setting, ensuring a lasting tribute to your loved ones. Durable and Weather-Resistant Design Designed to withstand various weather conditions, these grave flower pots are made from high-quality materials. The UV-resistant coating ensures the colors remain vibrant over time, making them ideal for outdoor use. Customizable Stability for Secure Placement ​Our artificial rose arrangements are supplied unweighted, allowing you to customize their stability according to your specific needs. For enhanced security against wind and other elements, you can add weight to the base using materials such as sand, stones, or floral foam. This flexibility ensures your tribute remains securely in place, providing peace of mind in various weather conditions. Maintenance-Free Beauty Enjoy the beauty of fresh flowers without the upkeep. Our artificial roses require no watering or pruning, offering a hassle-free solution that maintains its allure throughout the seasons. Everlasting Tribute: Premium Artificial Rose Arrangements for Cherished Memorials Honour your loved ones with our meticulously crafted artificial rose arrangements, designed to provide a timeless and maintenance-free tribute. Each arrangement features vibrant roses in hues of yellow, orange, and red, symbolising enduring love and remembrance. Constructed with UV-resistant materials, these flowers retain their vivid colours, standing resilient against the elements. The unweighted design allows for customisable stability, enabling you to add weight as needed for secure placement. Whether adorning a gravesite or enhancing a memorial space, these artificial roses offer a serene and lasting homage, ensuring your sentiments are beautifully conveyed through every season Artificial Grave Flower Collection UV Resistant: Crafted from high-quality materials, these artificial roses are UV-resistant, ensuring they maintain their vibrant colors even when exposed to direct sunlight.​ Durable Design: The grave flower pots are constructed to withstand various weather conditions, making them suitable for outdoor cemetery displays, grave decorations, and memorial arrangements in home gardens. Low Maintenance: Unlike real flowers, these artificial arrangements require no watering or pruning, offering a hassle-free and enduring tribute. Materials: Silk flowers with plastic stems and foliage; durable plastic pot
